summary: Comprehensive testing of StockHome inventory management MVP completed successfully. All core features tested including authentication, CRUD operations, dashboard stats, and barcode scanning integration.
passed_tests: API Root Endpoint - 200 OK
User Registration - Creates account with JWT token
User Login - Authenticates with valid credentials
User Profile - GET /api/auth/me returns user data
Categories CRUD - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE operations
Locations CRUD - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE operations
Products CRUD - Full lifecycle management
Product Quantity Updates - PATCH quantity endpoint
Shopping List Generation - Auto-generates from low stock
Shopping List Management - Manual item addition
Dashboard Stats - Returns aggregated statistics
Barcode Lookup - Open Food Facts integration
Frontend Registration Flow - Complete user signup
Frontend Login Flow - Authentication and redirect
Frontend Navigation - All pages accessible
Frontend Product Creation - Form submission and validation
Frontend Quantity Controls - +/- buttons functional
Frontend Scanner Page - Manual barcode input works
Frontend Categories Page - Displays default categories
Frontend Locations Page - Displays default locations
Frontend Shopping List - Generate button functional

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major flows working, minor timeout on invalid login test)
